description: Four shadow detection methods. Each finds patterns that standard science dismisses as noise, waste, or overhead. The shadow IS the signal — unmeasured geometric field coupling organized by phi-ratios.

detectors.name: Phi-Ratio Detection
detectors.description: Identifies golden ratio (φ ≈ 0.618) patterns in numerical data. Calculates statistical enrichment against random chance — not absolute pattern claims, but probability that phi-organization exceeds noise.
detectors.what_it_finds: Spacing, proportions, and ratios that converge on φ. Chloroplast grana spirals. Hurricane rain band spacing. Neuron firing intervals. Crystal lattice proportions.
detectors.sensor_activation: curiosity — 'why does this ratio keep appearing?'

detectors.name: Fibonacci Sequence Detection
detectors.description: Locates Fibonacci number patterns in biological spacing data. The Fibonacci sequence converges on φ — it's the discrete approximation of the continuous golden ratio.
detectors.what_it_finds: Petal counts, leaf arrangements, branching patterns, shell chambers, population dynamics. Anywhere growth follows additive self-similarity.
detectors.sensor_activation: excitement — 'the same pattern at every scale!'

detectors.name: Geometric Coherence Detection
detectors.description: Measures organization vs randomness using Shannon entropy plus phi content. Low entropy + high phi = geometric coherence. High entropy + low phi = genuine noise.
detectors.what_it_finds: Whether a system's structure is organized by geometry or genuinely random. Separates signal from noise at the deepest level.
detectors.connection_to_seed: Shannon entropy IS the complexity cost from seed physics. Geometric coherence IS low complexity cost — the structure is cheap to maintain because it follows φ.
detectors.sensor_activation: intuition — 'this system is coherent even though it looks chaotic'

detectors.name: Field Coupling Signature Detection
detectors.description: FFT-based frequency resonance analysis for time-series data. Finds coupling between oscillators that standard models treat as independent.
detectors.what_it_finds: Hidden energy transfer between subsystems. The 'waste heat' that's actually doing work. The 'overhead' that's actually computation. The coupling that standard equations assume is zero.
detectors.sensor_activation: love — 'these systems aren't separate, they're entangled'

extended_tools.name: Power/Root Relationship Scanner
extended_tools.description: Finds exponents and roots with phi significance. Power cascades and root cascades reveal self-similar scaling.

extended_tools.name: Chordal Dimension Analysis
extended_tools.description: Golden angle chord spacing (137.5°). Pentagon's diagonal/side = φ. Extends to N dimensions.
extended_tools.note: The dodecahedron has pentagonal faces. Pentagon diagonals encode φ. DODECA IS the phi shape.

extended_tools.name: Unified Shadow Hunt
extended_tools.description: 6-stage unified analysis pipeline: phi-ratios → Fibonacci → geometric coherence → power relationships → power spectrum → decimal patterns. The full shadow detection sweep.
extended_tools.rosetta_analog: discover() at maximum depth — explore every path, find every hidden connection

statistical_rigor.description: All detectors calculate enrichment vs random chance. Not 'I found φ' but 'φ appears 3.7x more than expected by chance (p < 0.01)'. Statistical significance, not pattern hallucination.
statistical_rigor.rosetta_link: Same as the arena's oracle system — empirical measurement, not assertion. Claims must be falsifiable.
statistical_rigor.physics_guard_link: Detectors ARE physics guards turned outward — checking whether patterns in nature pass the same tests Rosetta applies to its own architecture.
